adminNotificationsEmail.title: Email configuration
adminNotificationsEmail.description: Configure outbound email delivery settings for platform notifications.

accessDenied.title: You do not have permission
accessDenied.description: View access to notifications is required to open this page. Ask an administrator to grant the notifications.read permission for your role.
accessDenied.sessionHint: If permissions were changed recently, sign out and sign in again to refresh your session.
accessDenied.permissionNote: Access is controlled by your role permissions.

providerDescriptions.smtp: Deliver email through a standard SMTP server.
providerDescriptions.sendgrid: Deliver email using the SendGrid API.
providerDescriptions.mailgun: Deliver email using the Mailgun API.

configuration.title: Email configuration
configuration.description: Choose your email provider and configure sender details and credentials.

credentials.note: Credentials are encrypted at rest and only used for outbound email delivery.

form.statusDescription: Enable or disable email delivery for the platform.
form.providerHint: Select how outbound notification emails are delivered.
form.fromEmailHint: Address used as the sender on outbound emails.
form.fromNameHint: Display name recipients see in their inbox.
form.replyToHint: Optional address for replies to notification emails.
form.smtpPortHint: Usually 587 for TLS or 465 for SSL.
form.apiKeyHint: API key from your email provider dashboard.
form.credentialSavedPlaceholder: Saved — leave blank to keep current value

validation.title: Check required fields
validation.description: Please fix the highlighted fields before saving.
validation.fromEmailInvalid: Enter a valid from email address.
validation.replyToInvalid: Enter a valid reply-to email address.
validation.smtpPortInvalid: SMTP port must be a number between 1 and 65535.

updateSuccess.title: Email configuration saved
updateSuccess.description: Your email notification settings have been updated.

updateFailed.title: Could not save email configuration
updateFailed.description: Please check the form and try again.

loadFailed.title: Could not load email configuration
loadFailed.description: Please try again or refresh the page.

adminNotificationsSms.title: SMS configuration
adminNotificationsSms.description: Configure AfroSMS (AfroMessage) for outbound SMS delivery in Ethiopia.

accessDenied.title: You do not have permission
accessDenied.description: View access to notifications is required to open this page. Ask an administrator to grant the notifications.read permission for your role.
accessDenied.sessionHint: If permissions were changed recently, sign out and sign in again to refresh your session.
accessDenied.permissionNote: Access is controlled by your role permissions.

provider.name: AfroSMS
provider.description: Ethiopian SMS gateway powered by AfroMessage. Messages are sent via GET with your identifier, sender name, and API token.

delivery.title: AfroSMS configuration
delivery.description: Set your AfroMessage identifier, sender name, and API token.
delivery.fromIdHint: UUID identifier from your AfroMessage dashboard (the from parameter).
delivery.senderHint: Registered sender name shown on outbound messages (the sender parameter).

credentials.title: API credentials
credentials.description: Store your AfroMessage API token securely. Leave blank to keep the existing saved value.
credentials.authTokenHint: Bearer token from AfroMessage used to authorize send requests.
credentials.note: Credentials are encrypted at rest and only used for AfroSMS delivery.

test.title: Send test SMS
test.description: Send a test message using your saved configuration. SMS does not need to be enabled for testing.
test.phoneHint: Ethiopian mobile number including country code, e.g. +2519XXXXXXXX.
test.fixedMessage: Smart Dispatch test message. SMS configuration is working.
test.fixedMessageNote: A fixed test message is sent to prevent abuse.
test.saveFirst: Save your identifier, sender name, and API token before sending a test.

form.statusDescription: Enable or disable SMS delivery for the platform.
form.credentialSavedPlaceholder: Saved — leave blank to keep current value

validation.title: Check required fields
validation.description: Please fix the highlighted fields before saving.
validation.testPhoneInvalid: Enter a valid phone number with country code.

updateSuccess.title: SMS configuration saved
updateSuccess.description: Your SMS notification settings have been updated.

updateFailed.title: Could not save SMS configuration
updateFailed.description: Please check the form and try again.

loadFailed.title: Could not load SMS configuration
loadFailed.description: Please try again or refresh the page.

testSuccess.title: Test SMS sent
testSuccess.description: Check the recipient phone for your test message.

testFailed.title: Test SMS failed
testFailed.description: Please verify your configuration and try again.

adminFarePlans.title: Fare Plans
adminFarePlans.description: Configure pricing rules by vehicle type, class, region, and pricing model.

pricingModelHelp.flat: Fixed price per trip regardless of distance or duration.
pricingModelHelp.distance: Charge by distance traveled using a base fare plus per km rate.
pricingModelHelp.time: Charge by trip duration using a base fare plus per minute rate.
pricingModelHelp.distance_time: Combine distance and time for on-demand ride-hail style pricing.
pricingModelHelp.hourly: Charter pricing billed by the hour with a minimum booking duration.

empty.title: No fare plans found
empty.description: Fare plans will appear here once they are created.

accessDenied.title: You do not have permission
accessDenied.description: View access to fare plans is required to open this page.
accessDenied.sessionHint: If permissions were changed recently, sign out and sign in again to refresh your session.
accessDenied.permissionNote: Access is controlled by your role permissions.

stats.title: Total fare plans
stats.description: All pricing rules configured in the platform
stats.activeDescription: Plans currently available for fare calculation
stats.distanceTimeDescription: Plans using combined distance and time pricing

form.createDescription: Create a fare plan with at least an English name and pricing details.
form.editDescription: Update fare plan details, scope, and pricing rules.
form.name: Name

sections.identityDescription: How this fare plan appears in admin lists and reports.
sections.scopeDescription: Limit the plan to a vehicle type, class, and/or region, or leave blank for all.
sections.pricingDescription: Set the pricing model and rate components used for fare calculation.
sections.rulesDescription: Priority, waiting allowance, waiting fees, and availability.

form.perHourRateHelp: Hourly charter rate before minimum hours are applied.
form.perMinuteRateHelp: Applied to trip duration while the vehicle is in service.
form.minimumHoursHelp: Minimum billable hours. Total minimum charge is calculated automatically.
form.freeWaitingMinutesHelp: Idle time at pickup or stops that is included at no extra charge.
form.waitingFeePerMinuteHelp: Charged for each minute of waiting after the free waiting period ends.
form.priorityHelp: Higher priority plans are matched first when multiple rules apply.
form.isActiveOn: This plan is available for fare calculation.
form.isActiveOff: This plan is hidden from fare calculation.

errors.baseFareInvalid: Enter a valid base fare (0 or greater).
errors.rateInvalid: Enter a valid amount (0 or greater).
errors.hoursInvalid: Enter valid minimum hours (0 or greater).
errors.priorityInvalid: Enter a valid priority (0 or greater).
errors.waitingInvalid: Enter valid free waiting minutes (0 or greater).

deleteFailed.description: Could not delete the fare plan.
